programme.title: CBS Weekend News
programme.desc: Journalist Adriana Diaz anchors the Saturday edition of the CBS news program from Chicago, while Jericka Duncan takes the helm of the Sunday broadcast from New York. The two are the latest to fill the roll of weekend anchor, which was most recently represented by Reena Ninan and Eliane Quijano. The program offers the latest headlines, original reporting and in-depth pieces that add context and perspective to the world's events.

programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. programme.title: CBS News Sunday Morning
programme.desc: The sparkling notes of a trumpet fanfare and the familiar logo of the sun alert viewers that it's time for CBS's Sunday morning staple. Journalist Jane Pauley helms the show, taking over hosting duties from Charles Osgood, who spent 22 years on the job. A morning talk show, this program airs at a different pace and focuses much of its attention on the performing arts. After a quick update of the day's news and national weather, correspondents offer longer-length segments on a variety of topics, from architecture to ballet to music to pop culture to politics.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: The top-notch team of hosts Bob McKeown, Gillian Findlay, Mark Kelley and Habiba Nosheen provides unique and engaging documentaries from Canada and beyond. "The Fifth Estate" is a reference to the term Fourth Estate, and was chosen to highlight the program's determination to go beyond everyday news into original journalism. The series has won numerous awards for its reporting, including Gemini Awards, International Emmys, the Michener Award, and even an Academy Award for a 1981 episode that was released in theaters the following year. Since September 1975, Canadians have tuned in to experience interesting stories that are always well-crafted and thought-provoking.

But Ben hides a dangerous secret life: his boats are being used to move cocaine through Miami. Suddenly caught in a crossfire between DEA agents and the Mob, Ben makes a desperate stand to save his family and his empire in this action-filled thriller based on an incredible true story.

programme.title: The Limey
programme.desc: An extremely volatile and dangerous Englishman goes to Los Angeles to find the man he considers responsible for his daughter's death.

programme.title: Liberty Stands Still
programme.desc: Liberty, the wife of a gun manufacturer, is taken hostage by a man named Joe. Joe explains that his daughter died in a high school shooting and he plans to avenge himself upon the people responsible for manufacturing the firearm used to kill her.

programme.title: The President's Man: A Line in The Sand
programme.desc: A counterterrorism specialist is suspected of planning to set off a nuclear device.

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: Single mother Teena is brutally assaulted by a gang. When the criminals are set free, Detective John Dromoor is dismayed as to the lack of justice and plots revenge.

programme.title: Speed Kills
programme.desc: John Travolta commands the screen as Ben Aronoff (Travolta), a speedboat racing champion and multimillionaire living the American Dream. But Ben hides a dangerous secret life: his boats are being used to move cocaine through Miami. Suddenly caught in a crossfire between DEA agents and the Mob, Ben makes a desperate stand to save his family and his empire in this action-filled thriller based on an incredible true story.

programme.title: The Limey

programme.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
programme.desc: Marley Corbett (Kate Hudson) is young, beautiful, and wildly funny, but she's afraid of opening herself up to true love and commitment. Though she uses her humor to prevent matters from getting serious, a life-changing visit to her doctor (Gael Garcia Bernal) sends both of them on an eye-opening adventure of mutual discovery, leading to revelations neither thought possible. Also stars Peter Dinklage, Whoopi Goldberg, Kathy Bates and Rosemarie DeWitt.

programme.title: My Boss' Wedding
programme.desc: Nicole, a workaholic executive assistant, is given the unexpected task of planning her boss' wedding. All would be manageable except for the groom's free-spirited nephew Michael distracting Nicole's workflow.

programme.title: The Chateau Meroux
programme.desc: A woman inherits a struggling Napa Valley Winery and must compete against a ruthless neighbor to keep her business from failing. When she begins having feelings for a local winemaker, she is forced to realize that all is fair in love and wine.

programme.title: Modeled With Love
programme.desc: When model-maker Olivia's dad is set to retire, she believes she's the obvious pick to take over. Not sure that this is the right choice, her father brings in an outsider to compete for the title. Enter Simon, a charming exec whose big picture thinking threatens to upend Olivia's bubble.

programme.title: Broadcasting Christmas
programme.desc: Two news broadcasters who previously were in love, fight for a position as a morning talk show host that they both want, ultimately finding what made them like each other so much in the first place.

programme.title: A Christmas for the Ages
programme.desc: Prompted by their youngest granddaughter (Natasha Bure), four generations of women celebrate Christmas and family in the style of the 40s, 60s, 90s, and today.

programme.title: The Jingle Bell Jubilee
programme.desc: A city manager (Marshall Williams) recruits the help of a childhood friend (Erin Agostino) in setting right his town's Christmas Charity event, while she sets to work setting him up with her close friend.

programme.desc: Faced with spending Christmas alone, Jamie decides to anonymously give back to her community. But can she keep her secret from a handsome reporter who is after the story?

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. The Middleton Merriwick is still not in bloom.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Two guests arrive at Grey House and are immediately at odds.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Megan is tasked with turning her beloved hometown into a commercialized area.

programme.desc: 15-year-old Kara Robinson was abducted and escaped.

programme.title: The Love Hunt
programme.desc: A high-powered real estate executive returns home after her dad passes.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents
programme.desc: A veteran returns to his hometown, and unexpectedly falls for a local policewoman.

programme.title: Terry McMillan Presents
programme.desc: Ava rushes home to care for her elderly aunt in South Carolina.

programme.title: Mary J. Blige's Family Affair
programme.desc: The family must come together to help Kendra and Ben save their relationship.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger and his father head to their hunting cabin, hoping for a quiet weekend. Instead, they find themselves in a kill-or-be-killed stand for survival when they encounter a gang of ruthless drug traffickers.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: American businessman Jack Dwyer, wife Annie and their two young daughters arrive in Southeast Asia to begin a new life. As his company plans to improve the region's water quality, the family quickly learns that they're right in the middle of a political uprising. Armed rebels attack the hotel where they're staying, ordered to kill any foreigners that they encounter. Amid the chaos, Jack must find a way to save himself and his loved ones from the violence erupting all around them.

programme.title: The Next Three Days
programme.desc: Life for John and Lara Brennan (Russell Crowe, Elizabeth Banks) is miserable after she is convicted of a murder she says she did not commit. Three years later while struggling with the demands of work and raising his son alone, John is still trying to establish her innocence. When her final appeal is rejected, Lara becomes suicidal, forcing John to exercise the only option he has left: Break her out of prison.

programme.title: USS Indianapolis: Men of Courage
programme.desc: After their ship is torpedoed by a Japanese submarine, the crew members of the USS Indianapolis face a harrowing nightmare as their ship goes down in the shark infested Philippine Sea.

programme.title: Beowulf
programme.desc: After Beowulf, the mightiest warrior of all, destroyes the overpowering demon Grendel, he incurs wrath of the beast's mother to seek out revenge.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Exploring lost empires and finding priceless treasures... it's all in a day's work for Lara Croft. Though, a secret from her father's past is about to lead Lara to her greatest challenge.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life
programme.desc: Lara Croft sets out on a quest to save Pandora's box from landing into the wrong hands. Join her as she races through furious hand-to-hand battles, blazing shoot-outs and breathtaking sky-diving escapes to try to save the ancient artifact.

programme.title: The Core
programme.desc: Geophysicist Dr. Josh Keyes (Aaron Eckhart) discovers that an unknown force has caused the earth's inner core to stop rotating. With the planet's magnetic field rapidly deteriorating, our atmosphere literally starts to come apart at the seams with catastrophic consequences. To resolve the crisis, Keyes, along with a team of the world's most gifted scientists, travel into the earth's core. Their mission: detonate a device that will reactivate the core.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer Dirk Pitt (Matthew McConaughey) sets out for the African desert with his sarcastic companion (Steve Zahn) in search of a ship rumored to have vanished long ago, the main draw being the treasure supposedly hidden within the lost vessel. When the daring duo come across a beautiful scientist (Penélope Cruz) who is juggling an escape from a warlord and a mission to stop the spread of a powerful plague, their desert expedition begins to heat up.

programme.title: Paycheck
programme.desc: Michael Jennings (Ben Affleck) is a top-notch reverse engineer. Corporations pay him to crack the secrets of their competitors' products. When the job is done, he has his memory of it erased. Rethrick (Aaron Eckhart), head of a company called Allcom, hires Jennings to reverse-engineer a secret government device. After the job, Jennings wakes from the memory erasure to find himself being chased by various agencies. He soon realizes that the fate of the entire world may be in his hands.

programme.title: Shaft
programme.desc: Crooked cops on the take -- small-time drug lords -- sleazy informers and sadistic rich kids ready to kill --- for police detective John Shaft, its just another night in the underbelly of New York City, another shift facing down cops and criminals who want him dead and a legal system that thrives on money, not justice.

programme.title: All The Pretty Horses
programme.desc: Two cowboys search for work, but find trouble with the law when one falls in love with a rancher's daughter.

programme.title: Murphy's Romance
programme.desc: Emma moves to a ranch after a divorce and befriends the older Murphy, but then her ex shows up.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: A young couple discovers a cache of drugs in a sunken war ship and must run from the gangsters who stashed it.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A retired climber must launch a treacherous rescue effort up K2, to save his sister and her summit team.

programme.title: Queen Bee
programme.desc: In the 1950s American South, the vicious and conniving Eva Phillips (Joan Crawford) makes the lives of those around her miserable -- especially her husband, Avery (Barry Sullivan), who resorts to heavy drinking and becomes an alcoholic. Meanwhile, when Eva discovers her sister-in-law (Betsy Palmer) is to wed her former lover (John Ireland), she really becomes nasty. Witnessing Eva's cruel exploits is Avery's cousin, Jennifer Stewart (Lucy Marlow), who can only stand by, mortified.

programme.title: The 7th Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sailing to Baghdad after a narrow escape from the monster island of Colossa, the wedding plans of legendary hero Sinbad (Kerwin Mathews) and Princess Parisa (Kathryn Grant) are spoiled by the scheming sorcerer Sokurah (Torin Thatcher). In return for his previous help with the cyclops on Colossa, Sokurah demands that Sinbad retrieve a lamp he lost on the island. When Sinbad refuses, the conjurer shrinks Parisa, forcing the sailor and his crew back to the high seas in order to save her.

programme.title: You Belong to Me
programme.desc: Rich playboy Peter Kirk (Henry Fonda) crashes into Dr. Helen Hunt (Barbara Stanwyck) on a ski slope and overplays his injuries so she will continue her medical attention. He declares his love, and, although Helen insists that her career will always come first, the two get married. Soon, Peter is consumed by jealous suspicions of his wife's male patients and embarrasses Helen several times. Fearful of driving her away, Peter launches into character-changing behavior to prove his love.

programme.title: Miss Sadie Thompson
programme.desc: In the Pacific after the war, a U.S. Marine unit that includes Sgt. Phil O'Hara (Aldo Ray) is awaiting discharge when missionary Alfred Davidson (Jose Ferrer), physician Dr. Robert McPhail (Russell Collins) and singer Sadie Thompson (Rita Hayworth) arrive at the base. The soldiers are delighted by the spirited, friendly Sadie, and Phil falls in love with her. Davidson, however, unearths a secret in Sadie's past and, blocking her attempt to leave the island, demands that she repent.

programme.title: Top Secret!
programme.desc: Top Secret! pits American rock star Nick Rivers against the dreaded East German High Command. It's a race against time as Nick teams up with Hillary Flammond to find her father.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy
programme.desc: A West Texas farm boy goes to the big city where he rides a mechanical bull, meets his future wife, and encounters the antagonism of an ex-con

programme.title: Regarding Henry
programme.desc: Henry Turner is a New York lawyer who needs to win at any cost. But a single gun shot brings Henry's fast-track rise to a dead stop, leaving him incapacitated and with no memory of the life he used to lead.

programme.title: The Truman Show
programme.desc: Truman doesn't realize that his quaint hometown is a giant studio set run by a visionary producer/director/creator (Ed Harris), that folks living and working there are Hollywood actors, that even his incessantly bubbly wife is a contract player.

programme.title: Nurse Betty
programme.desc: What happens when a person decides that life is merely a state of mind? If you're Betty, a small-town waitress and soap opera fan from Fair Oaks, Kansas, you refuse to believe that you can't be with the love of your life just because he doesn't really exist. After all, life is no excuse for not living. Traumatized by a savage event, Betty enters into a fugue state that allows -- even encourages -- her to keep functioning... in a kind of alternate reality.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Movie
programme.desc: Dr. Clayton Forrester (Trace Beaulieu) figures he can rule the world if he deadens his subjects' brains by making them endure terrible movies. Exploiting his access to nearby satellite-dwellers Mike Nelson (Michael J. Nelson) and his robot pals, Crow T. Robot and Tom Servo (Kevin Murphy), Forrester makes them watch a cheesy 1950s spaceship film. But when Mike and friends make funny comments throughout the movie and others that follow it, Forrester's plan looks increasingly flimsy.

programme.title: In God We Trust
programme.desc: When the Order of St. Ambrose the Unlikely finds itself broke, the monks pin their hopes on the generosity of televangelist Armageddon T. Thunderbird (Andy Kaufman), and send the naïve Brother Ambrose (Marty Feldman) to Los Angeles to ask for $10,000 in person. En route, Ambrose is ripped off by traveling preacher Dr. Sebastian Melmoth (Peter Boyle), and subsequently rescued from the streets by a friendly prostitute (Louise Lasser), who helps him to track down the elusive Thunderbird.

programme.title: Opportunity Knocks
programme.desc: Eddie (Dana Carvey) is a con artist whose schemes usually involve dressing as a meter man to steal TV sets. But when he learns that a large home he is robbing is to be free for a few months, he decides to move in. However, businessman Milt (Robert Loggia) drops by, so Eddie assumes the identity of the yuppie house-sitter who never showed up. Impressed with Eddie, Milt gives him a job and introduces him to his beautiful daughter, Annie (Julia Campbell), and Eddie tries to keep up the charade.

programme.title: The Crush
programme.desc: Writer Nick Eliot (Cary Elwes) moves to a new city for a magazine job and rents a room in the house of Cliff (Kurtwood Smith) and Liv Forrester (Gwynyth Walsh), whose 14-year-old daughter, Adrian (Alicia Silverstone), instantly makes her attraction to Nick clear. While Nick romances photographer Amy Maddik (Jennifer Rubin) at work, he has trouble fending off Adrian's advances. As her obsession with Nick grows, Adrian becomes angry at being rejected and starts attacking his property and friends.

programme.title: Bad Moon
programme.desc: Ted (Michael Paré) is working in Nepal when he and his girlfriend are attacked by a mysterious creature. Ted, though brutally maimed, survives, but his girlfriend is not so lucky. To help his recovery, Ted moves close to his sister, Janet (Mariel Hemingway), and her son, Brett (Mason Gamble), but soon realizes he was attacked by a werewolf. Ted is helpless to stop his transformation and only Brett's German shepherd, Thor, is able to see that Ted is a danger to everyone around him.

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Doc (Alec Baldwin) and Carol (Kim Basinger) McCoy are married criminals looking for a high-paying score. When Doc ends up in a Mexican prison, Carol tells mob boss Jack Benyon (James Woods) that Doc will work for him if Benyon can free him from prison. Benyon hires Doc to rob a dog track, but after the heist goes terribly wrong, Doc and Carol escape with the cash. With a bitter thief (Michael Madsen) and Benyon's hired help on their trail, Doc and Carol must fight to survive.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove: Leaving
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers renew their spirit of adventure as they and other residents of a Texas town join a cattle drive to the Montana Territory.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Jay's hazing ends abruptly after a Gamma Pi visit. Liz lies to cover for Mindy, causing big issues for others.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks

programme.title: 4:44 : Time Of Fear (Dubbed)

programme.desc: 4 different couples spend 1 romantic week over New Year's Eve. Both coming out of failed marriages Ji-ho and Hyo-young are not open for the possibilities of new love. Heartbroken after being dumped Jin-ah heads to the other side of globe and encounters Jae-hun who also has left Seoul behind. Yong-chan and Yaolin are an international couple soon to get married but their already-growing marriage blues begin to get worse as Yong- chan is swindled out of his wedding savings. A Paralympic snowboarder Rae-hwan pops a question to his long-time girlfriend Oh-wol. They are a perfect match in their eyes but not in other's point of view.

programme.title: I am The King
programme.desc: A bookish prince swaps lives with a slave, leading to chaos and his rise as King in a comic twist of fate.

programme.title: 71: Into The Fire
programme.desc: A story of 71 student soldiers who bravely fought against the North Korean army during the Korean War.

programme.title: Evil Empire: Friday the 13th Chapter 2
programme.desc: At the same time, in a hospital in Pyongyang, North Korea, a female doctor discovers a phenomenon where the cells of the deceased are being revived. However, she is forced to flee to South Korea due to the authorities' pursuit. GenreA series of serial killings known as the "Suicide Syndrome" continue to occur simultaneously, and the whereabouts of both Phillip and Cheong-ha, who were investigating the case, remain mysterious. Meanwhile, the young police officer Jae-hyeok, who provided crucial clues to Cheong-ha in her time of crisis, finds himself relentlessly pursued by killers dispatched from Japan and the United States. Despite relying on information from an anonymous woman who calls him unilaterally, Jae-hyeok unwittingly gets drawn closer to the center of the case as the situation progresses. What is the key to the case that Jae-hyeok holds? Why are ruthless killers from the United States pursuing him? Why is the foreign police from Japan investigating the "Suicide Syndrome" in Korea? And why is North Korea trying to conceal the truth about a secret project from the Japanese military?

His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

Heart finds relief from heartache and a renewed sense of purpose when he steps in as a father figure to Niki and welcomes the two women into his life. But when Wanda becomes romantically involved with her drug dealer, Silas, it may endanger Niki and threaten to destroy the makeshift family.

Disguised as a prostitute, Coffy goes on a killing rampage, at first going after street dealers and pimps such as sleazy King George (Robert DoQui), then gradually working her way up to bigger honchos. She's shocked, however, when she discovers that her politician boyfriend (Booker Bradshaw) is involved.

programme.desc: Cheong-A is shocked to discover that Gi-cheol is still alive! To conceal the truth, Sung-man sends assassins after him. Meanwhile, cornered and desperate, Mal-ran takes her final step — revealing the true identities of Pil-joo and Bu-cheon to the world...

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.1
programme.desc: Do Hyun realizes that another personality exists within him and comes to understand that it's “multiple personality disorder.” Tae Im brings Do Hyun back to Korea to protect the family's control over the company. Meanwhile, Ri Jin searches for her missing patient, Heo Sook Hee, at Club Paradise, where she unexpectedly runs into Do Hyun — but he seems like a completely different person.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.2
programme.desc: Ri Jin is startled by Se Gi's completely different demeanor from Do Hyun's, but when he gets hurt during a sudden fight, she rushes him to the hospital. Ho Pil encounters Se Gi, mistaking him for Do Hyun. Meanwhile, Do Hyun decides to stay in Korea and join the battle for the successor position at Seung Jin Group. But after receiving a call that Ri Jin is being threatened by bikers, he tries to summon another personality.

programme.title: Kill me, Heal me Ep.3
programme.desc: Perry Park rushes to the scene despite warnings when he hears that a woman has been kidnapped by bikers. Ri Jin closely observes Do Hyun's completely changed demeanor. Do Hyun later attends the Seung Jin Group board meeting and is officially appointed vice president, but Tae Im slaps him in anger for being late.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.14
programme.desc: As Lee Rin speaks to Kisan, Court Lady Kim tries to tell him something. When Park Soo Jong enters, she glares at him. Park reports to Kisan that the Night Watchmen are gathering around Prince Wolgang (Lee Rin).

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.15
programme.desc: Enraged, Lee Rin tries to show Park Soo Jong his mother's blood-written letter, but Rang stops him. Soo Ryun tells her father that his power is the only way for her to have Lee Rin, insisting he must not lose.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.16
programme.desc: A malevolent ghost (Eokgwi) stares down at the sleeping Lee Rin and blows dark ghostly energy into his ear. Meanwhile, Kisan appoints Lee Rin as the head of the Changcheon Pagoda's construction.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.17
programme.desc: With Do Ha's help, Lee Rin breaks free from the ghostly energy. However, he pretends to still be possessed as part of a plan to trick Sadam. Maeng Sa Gong joins the Night Watchmen to help defeat the Eokgwi.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.18
programme.desc: Jo Sang Heon cannot distinguish the real Do Ha from the fake one, as both bear the Night Watchman's mark and the magic reveals no ghostly energy. Meanwhile, Kisan orders tax hikes and more manpower to speed up the pagoda's construction.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.19
programme.desc: Kisan is shocked to hear ghosts are killing palace staff Lee Rin and Do Ha vow to stop them. Do Ha sees her sister Yeon Ha's face superimposed on Mo Yeon Wol, preventing her from being harmed.

programme.title: Diary of a Night Watchman Ep.20
programme.desc: Park Soo Jong leads his troops to the palace, declaring he will take over as regent to fix the state's affairs. Meanwhile, Sadam is enraged to find that Do Ha, who was trapped inside a painting, has disappeared.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.13
programme.desc: Mi Young makes a successful exhibition debut with Daniel, and when Gun sees them together, jealousy flares. Chairwoman Wang is still pulling every string to get Gun married, but it isn't easy Se Ra is bitter about their lack of progress. Meanwhile, Mi Young runs into Gun outside her hotel room.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.14
programme.desc: Daniel finally finds the younger sister he has been searching for, and Gun is crestfallen to hear Mi Young plans to return to France. Yong suggests recruiting a female artist as a key strategic move for the company—and recommends Mi Young—but she turns Gun's business proposal down. Meanwhile, Daniel formally proposes to Mi Young.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.15
programme.desc: Chairwoman Wang sounds Mi Young out about reconciling with Gun, but Mi Young is resolute. Gun, as usual, visits Mi Young's mother's restaurant and runs into Mi Young there she asks him not to come anymore. Later, Mi Young is selected as the artist for Jangin Chemicals' ad-image collaboration project.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.16
programme.desc: Gun provides wholehearted support for the collaboration, while Mi Young grows uncomfortable with his constant presence at her side. Se Ra becomes increasingly uneasy about Mi Young's return.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.17
programme.desc: Mi Young decides to leave Korea right away, but news that Gun has been alone for three years weighs on her mind. Daniel is thrown when he hears Gun has a hereditary illness, and Se Ra seeks out Mi Young again.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.18
programme.desc: Mi Young decides to stay by Gun's side and meets with Chairwoman Wang. Gun announces he will step down in three months, with the chairwoman filling in during his absence. Yong's mom hands Gun a mysterious diary.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.19
programme.desc: Chairwoman Wang is dumbfounded when Gun and Mi Young suddenly go missing. Mi Young's mother asks Gun to let Mi Young go, and he works hard to change her mind. Meanwhile, Se Ra becomes convinced the little girl in Daniel's photo is her.

programme.title: I Survived...
programme.desc: What would you do if you were confronted with death? What gives someone the strength to survive? Is it luck, chance, instinct? In a stripped-down, simple-yet-cinematic interview style, I SURVIVED allows survivors to explain, in their own words, how they overcame unbelievable circumstances -- offering insight into what got them through an experience that changed their lives forever. A woman miraculously survives three gunshot wounds to the head.

programme.desc: Activists set out to search for waves on remote stretches of British Columbia's unspoiled coast.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Wild + Whole is rooted in the values of sustainable eating, which often means making use of less common ingredients alongside foods in the peak of the season. Kevin and Danielle work together to transform two strikingly different ingredients, Fresh Duck Liver and Chanterelle Mushrooms, into a dish that would be right at home on the menu of any of Kevin's restaurants.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Snow Goose gets a bad rap for being less than extraordinary when it comes to table fare. In reality nothing could be further from the truth! Kevin Gillespie shows Sean Weaver a spin on an American classic, Steak Diane, that is sure to impress even the most skeptical waterfowler.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve Rinella and Chef Kevin Gillespie are back in the kitchen, this time to work some magic with meat from his New Mexico bull elk. Kevin shows shows Steve one of his favorite quick dinner fixes, Vietnamese Style Shakin Elk. The two discuss some of the mythology surrounding marinades and brining, plus Steve shows off his prized culinary possesion, his citrus juicer.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaska's coastal rainforest for a solo Sitka blacktail deer hunt. With challenging terrain, thick fog, and incessant rain, finding a buck won't be easy. But if Steve connects on a Sitka blacktail, he'll celebrate with a camp meal of rock-pounded tenderloin.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range. The bears here are on a quest to fatten up on high elevation blueberries before they hibernate for the winter. Steve will need to hike into steep, rugged terrain to find a fat black bear and some of the finest tasting meat available to the American hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaska‚ Kenai Peninsula. Steven Rinella holds one of the permits this year, and he and his brother Danny backpack into the mountains, into rugged country they‚ never seen, in hopes of finding a billy goat.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge and seriously good food. 300 years ago Spanish settlers let a handful of pigs loose in order to turn acorns into bacon, and today Steve is hunting the feral descendants of those pigs. If he's successful in finding a wild boar, Steve will prepare a backcountry gourmet feast of pork loin roasted with apples and rosemary cooked in tin foil over a fire.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven Rinella, his brother Matt, and good friend Matt Moison camp and hunt the badlands of Eastern Montana for mule deer. Freezing cold temperatures and unforgiving topography add to the already-challenging job of finding a giant mule

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddy's historical family farm to hunt small game and whitetails in the famed Driftless area. There's plenty of action and tasty wild game meals like Grilled Butterfly Venison Steaks and Hassenpfeffer rabbit stew.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.sub-title: The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions with dog. With the help of two expert lion hunters, he immerses himself in the physical and emotional challenges of cougar hunting. Sometimes the reward of the hunt is the thrill of success and a delicious meal, and other times it's a more personal, and possibly more important lesson of knowledge and humility.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt. Steve knows Buffalo, but seeing and stalking these beasts in this dry, stark habitat is very different from anything he's ever done. But with persistence and patience, he's able to find a herd of one of North America's most iconic animals. Sharing the bounty, Steve experiences a traditional Mexican feast with a table of hungry cowboys.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's UNCHARTED
programme.desc: Jim and Roddy are on the hunt for record-setting monster moose while young Taylar and client Tom shift their sights to mountian caribou.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Hunting Adventures
programme.desc: This week Jim travels to the famed Patagonia mountains of Argentina to go after the mouphlon sheep.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's The Professionals
programme.desc: The team is back in the Yukon getting camp set up before the season starts. Included on the extensive to-do list is the challenging task of transporting the ARGO UTVs from one place to another.

programme.desc: At Volcano Bay, tensions rise between Charlie Summerville and his crew as they start building the wilderness cabin. Cowboy Pat Harvie looks back at his 30 years running America's most isolated ranch, and engineer Merrick Jackinsky gets stranded out on the icy Bering sea.

programme.title: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: An inquisitive bear puts a hole in Charlie Summerville's construction plans at Volcano Bay. Cowboy Pat Harvie teaches wife Connie salmon fishing Aleutian-style, and Merrick Jackinsky is on the hunt for caribou.

programme.title: Life on the Edge
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville goes missing at sea attempting to deliver construction materials by boat. programme.title: Brent Blakeney
programme.desc: Brent Blakeney is a towering Southern comedian and "recovering theater kid" with undeniable stage presence. From subverting basketball expectations to surviving as a substitute teacher, his playful humor and storytelling keep audiences laughing.

programme.title: Adam Carolla
programme.desc: Outspoken podcast king and comedian Adam Carolla brings his unique humor to Dry Bar. He delivers his first clean act as he gets real about the absurdities of modern day parenting, unsuccessful rebrands, and what the rich and poor have in common.

programme.title: K-Von
programme.desc: In his explosive return to Dry Bar, K-Von provides riotous explanations for President Biden falling up stairs, illegal salon activities, and the effects of being half-Persian.

programme.title: John C. Morgan
programme.desc: John C. Morgan takes to the stage as someone sure to be recognized. Along with immaculate impersonations, John teaches the audience invaluable lessons on how to conceal presidential farts and how many C's of leadership there are.

programme.title: Dwayne Perkins
programme.desc: Dwayne Perkins has earned a spot in today's elite class of stand-up comics with appearances on Comedy Central and on Conan. He's getting a lot of buzz for his recurring piece on The Jay Leno Show entitled "Great White Moments in Black History." Dwayne's Comedy Central half-hour special, a culmination of his talent and hard work, was very well received. It showcases his way of looking at life and his ability to convey it in a hilarious manner. Dwayne can be seen in the HBO movie The Gristle. Dwayne has also appeared in several commercials pushing products for The Man. Dwayne is part of The Bob & Tom Comedy Tour in addition to headlining colleges and comedy clubs across the country.

programme.title: Dwayne Perkins: Dwayne Explains
programme.desc: Dwayne returns to Dry Bar Comedy. If you loved his first special, you will certainly love his 2nd! Dwayne Perkins has earned a spot in today's elite class of stand-up comics with appearances on Comedy Central and on Conan.

programme.title: Joe Deuce: Mixed Reviews
programme.desc: Kentucky born and living the best of both worlds, Joe Deuce talks about his encounters with amish police, real-time irony, and toilet paper personality tests.

programme.title: Jessi Campbell
programme.desc: Jessi Campbell has recently been seen on Last Comic Standing. She was the 2015 Campus Activities Magazine Female Performer of the Year, an award she was also nominated for in 2013. Jessi's comedy CD “Winner Winner” has been featured on iTunes and can be heard on Sirius/XM Radio, Pandora Radio, and terrestrial radio stations across country. Jessi has performed at Gilda's LaughFest, The Boston Comedy Festival, The Great American Comedy Festival, San Francisco SketchFest, and was the People's Choice winner at the 2009 Aspen Rooftop Comedy Festival.

programme.title: Warren B Hall
programme.desc: Simply put Warren B Hall is not what you're expecting. He purposely avoids using the white vs black angle done by many mainstream black comedians. Daring to be different, Warren chooses to focus on funny! Earlier this year Warren was seen on the FOX TV show “Laughs”, he's also a regular on the Bob and Tom Morning Show. More importantly, Warren has gone overseas and performed for our troops stationed in Iraq, Kuwait and Afghanistan...not once or twice, but FIVE times. His style is original, relatable and definitely funny. Don't take his word for it, see some of the funny for yourself.

programme.title: Steve Hofstetter: A Trip to Japan

programme.title: Small Town Big Deal
programme.desc: To put a spin on a popular saying about Las Vegas, what happens in a small town stays in a small town. That's because small cities and towns across America often get lost in the mainstream media that focuses on major metropolitan areas like New York and Los Angeles. "Small Town Big Deal" tries to change that by telling the stories of innovation, tradition and success that are happening in rural places. Episodes cover small-town residents having an impact on others through their actions and notable businesses, including the Frankenmuth, Mich., retail store that is considered the world's largest Christmas store.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notices curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot (Kurt Russell) and the camp doctor (Richard Dysart) lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.sub-title: Learning to Walk on the Wild Side

programme.title: Oh Baby!
programme.sub-title: Growing up in a Winter Wonderland

programme.title: Oh Baby!
programme.desc: A safari on the african savannah reveals the abundant and diverse wildlife thriving on the open plains. From the baby elephants just learning to control their trunks, to the littlest zebras earning their stripes, watch as this vibrant world comes alive.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: David and Beryl are childhood sweethearts. In their late 60's now, they've been married for many enviably happy years. David has Multiple Sclerosis and they both felt it was time to bring a dog in the mix to be of assistance. Sue is a Cape Town local, with an illustrious record of international commercials behind her. She raises awareness that animals are sentient beings, deserving of as much love as much as every human and finds herself adopting a dog, even though it wasn't part of the plan.

programme.title: A Dog For Life
programme.desc: Meet Antonie, a self-professed "old soul", who is now on the hunt to find a dog exactly like him: a glorious misfit. The Adari's, a young and vibrant family mourning the loss of their beloved hound, Zeus, are finally ready to fall in love with another dog.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Journey to the center of Africa, the country of Uganda, to witness an amazing rescue of the endangered Rothschild's giraffe.

programme.title: Human Blood vs. Snake Venom!
programme.desc: Coyote tests what happens when human blood encounters snake venom in a controlled, educational experiment. He breaks down the biology, effects, and fascinating science behind venom.

programme.title: Top 13 Most Painful Insect Stings Coyote Peterson Has Ever Taken!
programme.desc: Coyote ranks the top 13 most painful insect stings he's ever taken. From bullet ants to wasps, it's a countdown filled with pain and science. From sand to sea, Coyote builds a mini mudflat aquarium packed with bizarre marine creatures. It's a deep dive into ocean ecology.

programme.title: Exploring Most Haunted House in America!
programme.desc: Spooky vibes abound as Coyote explores one of America's most haunted houses. What's real? What's legend? Only one way to find out. Pain is part of the job, but this one really hurts. Coyote's wild encounter leads to a cringeworthy injury and a valuable field lesson.

programme.title: Venomous Sewer Snake Found in Bangkok!
programme.desc: Urban exploration gets wild when Mark finds a rare venomous snake deep in the sewer systems of Bangkok.This insect doesn't bite—it sprays acid! Mark discovers a rare bug with an unbelievable defense mechanism aimed right at the eyes.

programme.title: Poison Ivy Smoothie – Big Mistake!
programme.desc: Coyote blends poison ivy into a smoothie to test a myth. Spoiler: bad idea. This wild episode mixes humor with a powerful message about plant toxicity.Roaches take over—literally. Coyote faces a nightmare infestation right on his head, exploring how these pests behave and thrive in close quarters.

programme.title: Ultimate Frog Scavenger Hunt!
programme.desc: Can Coyote catch every frog species in one day? This amphibian-packed episode follows a wild scavenger hunt in a lush ecosystem.A tiny puppy is covered in ticks. Coyote and team work quickly to remove them and explain the dangers of tick-borne illnesses.

programme.title: Frog Scavenger Hunt! – Can I Catch Them All?
programme.desc: How many frog species can Coyote catch in one day? This scavenger hunt is a race against time and terrain across wetlands and forests.Costa Rica's most dangerous pit viper is milked for venom in this nerve-racking episode. Coyote shows the precision it takes to stay safe.

programme.title: We Found Rare T‑Rex Teeth!
programme.desc: Coyote uncovers T-Rex teeth during a fossil hunt. Rare, real, and awe-inspiring, this one's for the dino lovers.

programme.title: Bitten by a Giant Bloodworm!
programme.desc: A second sighting of the rare blue frog leaves Coyote stunned. The frog's vibrant coloration is even more incredible up close.Giant bloodworms have jaws and venom, and they're not shy about using either. Mark finds out the hard way.

programme.title: Eaten Alive by Sea Lamprey!
programme.desc: The sea lamprey is a nightmare with a mouth full of teeth. Coyote experiences what it's like to be eaten alive—literally.Coyote explores a recently abandoned grizzly bear cave, uncovering signs of the massive predator's presence in a thrilling and suspenseful wilderness episode.

programme.title: Sucked by Tiger Leeches!

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Wordsworth: First Words Around the House
programme.desc: As their communication skills continue to develop, little ones begin to recognize common words and may point to objects or pictures when these items are named. Baby Wordsworth playfully taps into your little one's natural curiosity and introduces 30 words from around the home -- both spoken and in sign language. This engaging program presents little ones with familiar objects in the kitchen, playroom, yard and more -- from the living room window to their favorite teddy bear.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Journey to the classroom with your favorite Baby Einstein friends! Learn about what makes your face incredible, baby's first sounds, and counting in different languages with a focus on Spanish! Real-life engaging imagery, upbeat classical melodies and gentle narration and repetition introduce first words, faces and a variety of different languages to young viewers.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Moves: Get Up and Go
programme.desc: Within the first year of babies' lives, their physical development begins to kick into high gear as they explore ways to physically interact with the world around them. BABY'S FIRST MOVES is a joyful celebration of their movement milestones -- including first steps, clapping, jumping, dancing and more.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: My First Signs: See and Sign With Baby
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: As babies continue to explore the world around them, they soon encounter many creatures, both large and small, that are extremely intriguing. Whether furry or feathered, winged or wiggly, bumpy or smooth, each holds a special fascination. Neighborhood Animals exposes little ones to animals most likely to be found close to home or in easily recognized environments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Cal's Sound Yard
programme.desc: Cal's Sound Yard is a new animated series from Baby Einstein that introduces the letters of the alphabet and the sounds they make. Why all the tracing and repetition? And why are the letters out of order? Don't worry! There's a reason for all that the content is based on "The Einstein Way" - a curiosity-driven learning philosophy, from industry experts, inspired by Montessori and STEAM.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show. Ginger Snap invents a version of TV, which she calls Berryvision, to broadcast the show all over Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: On a beautiful winter's night, Blueberry reads the Baby Berrykins a story of what happened one winter in Berry Bitty City-a winter that almost wasn't. Just as everyone is ready for winter fun and fashions, a sudden warming melts the snow and ruins their plans. Improvising with snowmen made of shaved ice and cotton puffs, Strawberry and her friends play "Capture the Snowman's Carrot Nose." The Berrykins want to join in the fun, so the girls play against them, with Strawberry refereeing.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland. Unfortunately, she's become a bit of a diva in the process, and her self-centered behavior is about to cut her career short.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and the girls excitedly plan to put on a "Story Time On Stage" musical play for the Berrykin kids: "Berryella and Prince Berry Charming," directed and choreographed by Plum, with musical direction by Cherry. Strawberry will play Berryella, with Lemon and Blueberry as her comically jealous stepsisters, and costume designer Raspberry as her Fairy Fashionmother.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It appears winter is finally coming to an end and Raspberry is planning a big fashion show to display her spring line. Her vision is to have the girls model her fashions in a parade past the town fountain. What she didn't realize is that the Berrykins are turning the fountain into a big water show. Every time the girls come to rehearse, they must comically dodge jets of fruit juice from the out-of-control fountain-the Berrykins are still working out the bugs.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is feeling left out of all the kids' play. She's the only one with four legs. There's no one like her to talk to and share her feelings. So Strawberry and the others take Honey Pie to Ice Cream Island - a land of horses.

programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

programme.desc: Sid and his friends investigate and discover that leaves are food for animals, they provide shade, and they help make nutrients so flowers and trees can grow!

programme.desc: Sid and his friends use their magnifying glasses and discover ants, rolie polies, and caterpillars around the playground.

programme.title: Blippi's Great Green Adventure
programme.desc: In this special episode, Blippi celebrates Earth Day with his Great Green Adventure. Caring for the environment is one of our prime responsibilities and Blippi teaches children how by taking them on a puzzle-solving adventure.

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community. Plum suggests that she teach music lessons Plum has always wanted to learn the drums, as it would enhance her ability to give dance lessons with live rhythmic accompaniment.

programme.title: Link into the VRAINS
programme.desc: n Den City, duels are held in the highly advanced VR world Link VRAINS, which is always under attack by the Knights of Hanoi. However, a hero named Playmaker has arrived to face the Knights, capturing a program they want called an Ignis.

programme.title: Seize the Wind!

programme.desc: Blippi is back with Blippi's Sports Summer Games Movie For Kids!

programme.title: Top Talent
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival. Strawberry and Cherry are going to sing a duet, Orange is going to juggle, Plum will perform a ballet, Blueberry is writing and directing a play that the Berrykins will perform, Lemon will design animal-shaped hairstyles and display them herself, Princess Berrykin is going to yodel, and Berrykin Bloom will to do a stand-up comedy routine. Raspberry, who was the big star of the music recital (with only nine mistakes), is going to perform her same keyboard piece.

programme.title: A Star is Fashioned
programme.desc: Raspberry is discovered by a talent scout who wants her to move to Berry Big City and design a new line of Glitter fashions! She will be provided with her own studio, staff, publicity, commitments from big department stores—everything she needs to be a big fashion designing star! All her friends are thrilled for her. Only Cherry is a bit less enthusiastic about Raspberry's stardom, which Raspberry mistakenly interprets as jealousy. During Raspberry's preliminary trip to the city to begin arrangements for her new design studio, her friends get a taste of life without her. They miss her, and it makes them sad. Cherry admits to Strawberry that she's concerned for Raspberry—stardom is not all it's cracked up to be. We see that Cherry was worried about her friend, not jealous. Raspberry returns to pack up her little boutique. Her friends barely recognize her.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: After a summer of competing in their own sporting extravaganza, Shaun and the Flock return, along with Shaun's best mate, the ever faithful Bitzer, the Farmer, and all the Mossy Bottom Farm favourites. Season 3, episodes 18 - 20.

programme.title: Timmy Time Narrated
programme.desc: Timmy is a little lamb with a lot to learn! He has just turned 3 and is used to getting his own way. Now Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals - at Nursery School! Season 3, episodes 5 - 8. Narrated.

programme.title: Timmy Time Narrated
programme.desc: Timmy is a little lamb with a lot to learn! He has just turned 3 and is used to getting his own way. Now Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals - at Nursery School! Season 3, episodes 9 - 12. Narrated.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: A Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit head to the moon in a home-made rocket for their annual picnic. Despite some hiccups, the duo makes it just in time for lunch. But a resident mechanical caretaker isn't too happy to see Wallace eating slices of moon cheese…

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. Join the Alphablocks for a fun-filled journey into reading, from first meeting the alphabet to reading words like 'alphabet'. Season 3, episodes 13 - 16.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. Join the Alphablocks for a fun-filled journey into reading, from first meeting the alphabet to reading words like 'alphabet'. Season 3, episodes 17 - 20.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Alphablocks - How Now, Brown Cow?: The Alphablocks meet their match when the Brown Cow and her singing friends Owl, Howl and Growl take the stage. This episode introduces the OW letter team and the words cow, brown, own, howl, growl, gown, crown, town and down.

programme.title: Alphablocks

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Explore phonics through songs, stories and plenty of fun with the Alphablocks! Season 3, episodes 22 - 26.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: Alphablocks - Blue: U is upside-down and the whole of Alphaland is blue. He sings a song to explain why. Introducing the long U sounds, the letter teams EW, UE and U_E and the words new, grew, blew, flew, true, blue, glue, rescue, tune, lute, flute, prune and mule.

programme.title: Alphablocks

programme.sub-title: The Rainbow Wave // The Best Pet You Never Met
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. programme.desc: After many years of working hard on Accelerator Acres, Tilly the tractor is ready to retire from ranch life. programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Do // A Very Avery Day
programme.desc: As Rev and Avery compete to see who can be the best helper, they accidentally work against each other and end up making things more complicated for those they // Rev thinks Avery is moving away! programme.title: Rev and Roll

Avery is faster, so Rev tries to take a short cut to get ahead-but an obstacle stops him in his tracks. How will he finish his delivery in time, let alone win the competition?

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble first! // When Molly tells a campfire story about the Fender Bend Beast, the kids' imaginations run wild. programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Gear Up Grand Prix // Chinese New Year
programme.desc: As the Gear Up Grand Prix begins, each of the friends runs into problems and must drop out of the race. Soon, slow and steady Lori is the only one left standing! Cheered on by her friends, can Lori and Tipper find the confidence to win? // When the gang puts on a Chinese New Year play, they cast Rumble as the monster. He's a natural! But in rehearsal Rumble begins to worry that he'll be too scary for the audience on opening night. Rumble will need his friends to help him find his roar!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and the gang are painting a mural for Four-Wheeled Friendship Day! But with Avery in charge, the friends start to lose confidence in their work. She may be a master when it comes to art, but Avery has a lot to learn about being project leader! // When the pals befriend a mouse in the barn, Rumble can't resist breaking the rules by bringing the little guy a snack. Before long there are mice everywhere! Rev and Rumble will need to shoo away their tiny guests, before Mom and Dad find them!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev hears a snowstorm is coming, he starts building the best winter track ever! One problem...Rev is sick. No matter what his friends say, they can't keep him away. Eventually he'll need to admit the best way for him to help is to go home and rest. // When Rev and Avery investigate veggie-rustling rabbits, they form a posse to run them out of town. The Cowboy Kids track down the thieving rabbits and discover they have babies! Now the posse will need to help the rabbits find a better way to feed.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park // The Castle of Fender Bend
programme.desc: When damage from a storm threatens to cancel the Wild Wheelin' Stunt Park Skills Contest, Owen is disappointed he won't get to compete. Rev leads the kids in the Stunt Park clean-up, and soon discovers that this is really an opportunity in disguise! // Rev and the gang make their own castle and play as knights of old. But when their sticks and building supplies begin to disappear, Bo leads them into a medieval battle of wits with the culprit-a cranky beaver!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bad Luck Truck // Rev it to the Max
programme.desc: When Rumble cracks his mirror, he thinks it gave him bad luck, and his confidence takes a hit. Even after Rev fixes the mirror and bolsters his pal, the bad luck continues. But when danger strikes, can Rumble regain his self-esteem and save the day? // When Rev hears about a vehicle long jump contest, he dreams of fame and victory. But even with a grueling training plan from coaches Avery and Alley, the record-breaking jump seems out of reach...until Alley ends up in danger and needs their help!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: When Rev offers to help look after a rambunctious puppy, Rumble gets jealous of all the attention he gets. And much to his annoyance, while Rev and Avery try everything to teach the pup new tricks (with no success), it only has eyes for Rumble! // When Rev tries to teach Rumble to swim with his special inflated tires, Rumble keeps sinking to the bottom of the pond. Ben and Molly suggest they get advice from Gilly, the old Fender Bend ferry pilot.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: Bumper Ball // Vroom with a View
programme.desc: When a game of Bumper Ball gets a little too heated, the friends start competing against their own teammates! But when a stray ball knocks open the sheep pen, they'll have to learn to work together to round up the sheep...and get back to the game! // Rev and his friends receive a map in pieces, so they race up separate mountain trails, vying to be first to claim the treasure at the top. But when there's no treasure in sight at the end, Rev's parents have some advice for finding the real reward.

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Crystal Cavern // Monster Truck // Winter Bestival // The Mystery of Missing Trees
programme.desc: Rev and Avery go on an adventure to discover the Crystal Cavern. As they enter the first cave, a swarm of bats scare Rumble so much, he takes off through a maze of tunnels! They can't worry about the Crystal Cavern-they have to find Rumble...

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.desc: Rev and Avery set out to conquer a legendary endurance course, the course's challenges put their truck power to the test. But as they near the end, a call for help takes them off course-and straight into a rescue mission to save their heroes! // When Rev sees Lori working the quarry in secret, Lori asks Rev to keep it secret-she worries she isn't good enough, and dreams of working with the big quarry trucks one day. But when quarry workers need help, Rev has to convince Lori to save the day!

programme.title: Rev and Roll
programme.sub-title: The Camping Trip // Like Father Like Son
programme.desc: Rev can't wait to take Avery camping. But when he learns they're trying a new campsite for the first time ever, he is disappointed-what if the new campsite isn't as fun...or worse...boring?! It's up to Avery to get him excited for a new adventure! // Rev wants to be just like his dad, so he and Rumble attempt Ben and Duke's usual tasks. programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. programme.title: Dibo The Gift Dragon

programme.title: Everything's Rosie
programme.desc: Join Rosie and her friends as they go on fun adventures, play games and solve problems. Each episode contains an educational message so that kids are engaged while learning. With a focus on friendship the show also promotes positivity through teamwork.

programme.title: Pins and Nettie
programme.desc: Pins and Nettie are besties and there is nothing they like more than going on adventures together, most of time.

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Mya Go is a preschool animated show about a young girl whose enthusiasm infects everyone around her. Set in the bustling town of Everyday, Mya Go lives here with the Go family and lives nearby her closest friends.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones grow, so does their awareness of the world around them. In this season, discover and learn about animals, starting with the ones that your children may encounter at home, to farm animals, all the way to the most unique of creatures from all 7 continents!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Doby & Disy: Exploring Journey
programme.desc: Adorable twin brother and sister, Doby & Disy, go on adventures in the magic forest together with their friends. They learn different colors, figures, songs and communication skills by solving various problems on the way.

programme.title: Little Malabar
programme.desc: Little Malabar is very curious and very lucky. He gets to travel into the universe as if it were a big playground, and talk to planets and stars to understand where we come from and how our world took form.

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock' Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it's not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.
